title: 2647-Y
description:
The Spanish-style 1 kanal house in DHA Phase 7 was designed to bring timeless elegance and luxury to modern family living. Real Enterprises carefully crafted this residence with classic Spanish architectural elements, including arched entrances, decorative balconies, textured exterior finishes, and warm earthy tones.

The house features spacious bedrooms with attached bathrooms, grand living areas, a modern kitchen, stylish ceiling designs, and premium flooring throughout. Large windows and open spaces were incorporated to provide natural light while maintaining the rich and sophisticated feel of Spanish-inspired architecture.

Special attention was given to the exterior elevation, landscaping, ironwork details, and premium finishing to create a truly distinctive home. Every aspect of the project was completed with precision to deliver both beauty and functionality.

This project reflects Real Enterprises’ ability to create unique, high-end homes in premium locations like DHA Phase 7.
